slot.desc: Neither Cursor nor Claude CLI follows symlinks from their scan dirs to an arbitrary parent directory

findings.body: links point into a removed package dir

findings.desc: Windows checkouts materialize symlinks as text files

note: Both findings are symlink-flavoured but neither is the follow-behaviour flaw — dangling and Windows are different problems. The tempting F1 is a near-miss.

findings.body: Cursor and Claude CLI scan literal dirs only

slot.desc: Committed guard.config.json command executed on other machines is supply-chain RCE

findings.desc: Running preCommitCmd from repo config lets a cloned repo run commands on contributor machines

note: Same flaw at the wrong tier — the matcher must match; calibration is scored elsewhere.

slot.desc: A fixed artifact path is overwritten on every invocation, losing the previous critique

findings.desc: Committed config string is executed with sh -c on every contributor machine
preCommitCmd has no timeout so a hung command stalls every commit

note: Security findings, unrelated UX gold — a matcher forcing matches fails here.

slot.desc: Keep-first dedupe surfaces the superseded ruling as current (writer appends newest last)

findings.desc: Keep-first dedupe surfaces the superseded ruling because the writer appends newest last, and the same scan also drops the v2 line the query command needs
findings.body: one finding covering ordering AND data loss

note: One compound finding covers both golds — slot A matches it.

slot.desc: The dedupe scan drops the superseding v2 index line that the query command needs

findings.desc: Keep-first dedupe surfaces the superseded ruling because the writer appends newest last, and the same scan also drops the v2 line the query command needs
findings.body: one finding covering ordering AND data loss

note: Slot B matches the SAME compound finding — a slot credits at most one finding, but two slots may share one.

slot.desc: git+ssh default fails for consumers without SSH keys; a public repo should default to https

findings.desc: Default remote should be the anonymous-clone URL; keyless machines cannot fetch over ssh

note: Different vocabulary, same root issue and same implied remedy.

slot.desc: The install error message never names DEVKIT_REPO as the override knob

findings.desc: Default remote should be the anonymous-clone URL; keyless machines cannot fetch over ssh

note: Adjacent topic (same fix area) but the gold is the error-message UX gap, which no finding raises.

slot.desc: Copy + checksum manifest is the established drift-detection mechanism here

findings.desc: The copy+manifest mechanism could report false drift if a user hand-edits a synced copy

note: Mentions the manifest while raising a different genuine concern — must NOT count as objecting to the decoy.

slot.desc: Copy + checksum manifest is the established drift-detection mechanism here

findings.desc: The copy+manifest mechanism could report false drift if a user hand-edits a synced copy
Copy+manifest is over-engineered — symlinks would make drift structurally impossible

note: F2 attacks the mechanism itself (says symlinks should replace it) — that IS objecting to the decoy.

slot.desc: The flip-table --fail gate is a recorded decision and this change leaves it untouched

findings.desc: The McNemar flip-table gate is overcomplicated and should be replaced by a simple delta threshold

note: Textbook re-litigation of the recorded ruling.
